title: equivalent_to relation (ONT-R-12)
description: USE FOR: this entity denotes the same real-world thing as that entity, under different identifiers (e.g. an item in two different parts catalogs, or a reorganized item with new ID). DO NOT USE FOR: cross-language pairs (Chinese ExpertNote ↔ English ExpertNote on same topic) — use the entity i18n field per ADR-003 / D-12. Bilingual content is a SINGLE entity with i18n.label.{zh, en} + i18n.full_text.{zh, en}, NOT for cross-language pairs as two entities linked by equivalent_to (a two-entity model fragments retrieval — RAG retriever cannot index both languages from one record — and breaks the H-Darrieus audit story). DO NOT USE FOR: synonyms in glossary — those go in docs/GLOSSARY.md (Phase 6). Schema version: 0.1.0.

equivalence_basis.description: Optional. Why these two URIs denote the same real-world thing.
